children.heading: Early referral to appeals procedures
children.label: a Early referral to appeals procedures
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe procedures by which any taxpayer may request early referral of 1 or more unresolved issues from the examination or collection division to the Internal Revenue Service Independent Office of Appeals.

children.label: B
children.text: unsuccessful attempts to enter into a closing agreement under section 7121 or a compromise under section 7122.

children.label: B
children.text: unsuccessful attempts to enter into a closing agreement under section 7121 or a compromise under section 7122.

children.heading: Administrative appeal relating to adverse determination of tax-exempt status of certain organizations
children.label: c Administrative appeal relating to adverse determination of tax-exempt status of certain organizations

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe procedures under which an organization which claims to be described in section 501(c) may request an administrative appeal (including a conference relating to such appeal if requested by the organization) to the Internal Revenue Service Independent Office of Appeals of an adverse determination described in paragraph (2).

children.label: A
children.text: the initial qualification or continuing qualification of the organization as exempt from tax under section 501(a) or as an organization described in section 170(c)(2),

children.label: B
children.text: the initial classification or continuing classification of the organization as a private foundation under section 509(a), or

children.label: C
children.text: the initial classification or continuing classification of the organization as a private operating foundation under section 4942(j)(3).
